text: Profitability metrics remain robust, with Adobe maintaining industry-leading margins across all key measures. In Q4, gross margin stood at 88.92% (K003), supported by gross profit of $5,508,000,000 (C011). Operating margin reached 36.50% (K004) on operating income of $2,261,000,000 (C012), while net margin was 29.96% (K005) based on net income of $1,856,000,000 (C013). EBITDA margin of 39.52% (K006) further underscores the company's strong operational efficiency. These margin levels reflect Adobe's scalable software business model and pricing power, though investors should monitor for any compression as the company continues investing in AI capabilities and product innovation.
